currentClaim: Threadsmith open-source onboarding polish has a focused branch: cross-platform npm startup, macOS launcher guidance, $threadsmith boundary docs, release notes, contributing docs, and release checklist are aligned for human review before merge.

doneWhenChecklist.label: 从 main 开 release/open-source-onboarding-polish 分支，不直接改 main
新增并验证跨平台 npm run start 路径
README、usage guide、release notes、CONTRIBUTING 与 release checklist 对齐新用户上手路径
$threadsmith skill 的使用边界与无 skill 时的可用范围已说明
git diff check、unit tests、build、launcher verification 与 npm start smoke 通过
README Quick Start 仍需用户人眼验收后再 squash/merge 到 main

knownGaps: multi-provider automatic execution is still out of scope.
